Paid Tier, per 1M tokens in USD

Input price

Free of charge

$1.25, prompts <= 200k tokens

$2.50, prompts > 200k tokens

Output price (including thinking tokens)

Free of charge

$10.00, prompts <= 200k tokens

$15.00, prompts > 200k tokens

Free of charge

$0.625, prompts > 200k tokens
